title: CI/CD: Biome+ultracite lint/format, tsc, changesets+OIDC publish

stories.title: Tooling deps installed (single Biome engine, changesets)
acceptanceCriteria: Root package.json devDeps include @changesets/cli@^2.31.0 and @changesets/changelog-github@^0.7.0
apps/docs devDeps include ultracite@7.8.3 and @biomejs/biome@2.4.16 (linter=biome)
packages/render-sdk devDeps include @biomejs/biome@2.4.16 (same version, single hoisted binary)
bun install completes and bun.lock updated with no resolution errors

stories.title: Biome config for render-sdk (plain, standalone)
acceptanceCriteria: packages/render-sdk/biome.json exists, standalone (does NOT extend ultracite), recommended rules + formatter on src/scripts/test
packages/render-sdk has scripts lint='biome ci .', format='biome check --write .', typecheck='tsc --noEmit'
After one-time format, 'bun --filter @remocn/render-sdk run lint' exits 0 (biome ci clean)

stories.title: Ultracite (biome) config for docs
acceptanceCriteria: apps/docs/biome.jsonc exists with extends ['ultracite/biome/core'] and resolves in the bun workspace
apps/docs has scripts lint='ultracite check', format='ultracite fix', typecheck (fumadocs-mdx && next typegen && tsc --noEmit)
'bun --filter docs run lint' exits 0 after one-time format (or pre-existing lint findings are resolved/justified)

stories.title: Root aggregator scripts
acceptanceCriteria: Root scripts: lint, format, typecheck fan out via bun --filter '*' run <script>
Root scripts: changeset, changeset:version='changeset version', release='bun --filter @remocn/render-sdk run build && changeset publish'
'bun run lint' and 'bun run typecheck' exit 0 at repo root

stories.title: Changesets config (changelog-github, OIDC-ready)
acceptanceCriteria: .changeset/config.json exists: changelog @changesets/changelog-github {repo: Remocn/render-sdk}, access public, baseBranch main
.changeset/README.md present
'bunx changeset status' runs without config errors; docs (private) is excluded from release

stories.title: CI workflow (.github/workflows/ci.yml)
acceptanceCriteria: Triggers: pull_request + push to main; concurrency cancel-in-progress; checkout fetch-depth: 0
Single job on bun 1.3.2 (oven-sh/setup-bun pinned): install --frozen-lockfile -> lint -> typecheck -> test -> build
Soft changeset status step (non-blocking, '|| true') for PR hint
YAML is valid (parses) and uses pinned bun version

stories.title: Release workflow (OIDC trusted publishing)
acceptanceCriteria: .github/workflows/release.yml triggers on push to main; permissions contents:write, pull-requests:write, id-token:write
Steps: setup-bun 1.3.2 + setup-node 22 + 'npm i -g npm@latest' (>=11.5.1 for OIDC); bun install; changesets/action@v1 with version='bun run changeset:version', publish='bun run release'
No NPM_TOKEN; GITHUB_TOKEN + NPM_CONFIG_PROVENANCE=true env; no registry-url with empty NODE_AUTH_TOKEN
YAML is valid (parses)

stories.title: Manual-prereqs doc (RELEASE.md / PRD for user-owned steps)
acceptanceCriteria: RELEASE.md documents: 1) manual first npm publish to claim @remocn/render-sdk, 2) npmjs Trusted Publisher setup (org Remocn, repo render-sdk, workflow release.yml), 3) GitHub 'allow Actions to create PRs', 4) how to add a changeset and how a release flows
Doc is accurate to the implemented workflows (file names, script names match)
